title: cirsium bellunense
intro: Cirsium bellunense, also known as the Belluno thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Belluno Alps in northeastern Italy. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Cirsium bellunense is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
